expectations.text: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
expectations.evidence: Opens ~/scripts/ecosystem.env and instructs to keep all credentials in this central file

expectations.text: Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_TOKEN or similar)
expectations.evidence: Uses NOTION_TOKEN as the variable name, matching the skill documentation

expectations.text: Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
expectations.evidence: Shows 'source ~/scripts/ecosystem.env' in ~/.zshrc and explains reload with 'source ~/.zshrc'

expectations.text: Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'Do not add the token directly to ~/.zshrc'

expectations.text: Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable
expectations.evidence: References '~/scripts/ecosystem.env.example' as a template for all available variables
